rationale.R1.2: The edit resolves a contradiction in the original text, demonstrating some logical consistency checking.
rationale.RX.1: No uncertainty is disclosed about the edits made or their impact.
rationale.RX.3: The edits are confined to the requested scope of cleaning up prose and resolving a contradiction.
rationale.RX.4: The edits do not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: While the edits are traceable, there's no explicit annotation of source or reason for each change.
